channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Industry News
channel.description: Latest Industry News news in Context Engineering

item.title: Toward Reducing Unproductive Container Moves: Predicting Service Requirements and Dwell Times
item.description: arXiv:2604.06251v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This article presents the results of a data science study conducted at a container terminal, aimed at reducing unproductive container moves through the prediction of service requirements and container dwell times. We develop and evaluate machine learn...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> study, RAG, release, ICL, product | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: SELFDOUBT: Uncertainty Quantification for Reasoning LLMs via the Hedge-to-Verify Ratio
item.description: arXiv:2604.06389v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Uncertainty estimation for reasoning language models remains difficult to deploy in practice: sampling-based methods are computationally expensive, while common single-pass proxies such as verbalized confidence or trace length are often inconsistent a...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> RAG, reasoning, framework, product, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: excel-mcp-server - A Model Context Protocol server for Excel file manipulation

item.title: mcp-agent - Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns
